profile.name: Shafayat Alam
profile.title: Mechanical Engineer · Roboticist
profile.bio: I'm a Mechanical Engineering graduate from Stony Brook University with experience across underwater robotics, aerospace systems, and computational fluid dynamics. My interests span the full stack in research and engineering of mobile robotics systems that interact with a fluid medium, always grounded in rigorous analysis and testing.
profile.education: B.E. Mechanical Engineering · Stony Brook University · 2026
